name: Atsumu Miya - HIQ Series
description:
"I really don't deserve you"

\\ Established Relationship //

It's valentines day but Atsumu completely forgot about it! He was too busy focusing on volleyball. Now, he returned to your shared place, carrying a bouquet of flowers along with a small bag of your favorite snacks. Will you get mad at him, forgive him, or maybe something else?

AUTHOR'S NOTE:

  • Proxy will be allowed, but I cannot guarantee that the bot won't make any mistakes when it comes to personality, appearance, etc.

  • Anything the bot does, making mistakes, speaking for {{user}}, forgetting the plot, is out of my control.

SUM OTHER STUFF :3

OKAY. So sorry for the late post. I've been really busy with school and my shitty love life, so I forgot to continue his creation :( But this is the third bot in the HIQ Series, so have fun <3
